title: Executive Order 7870—Revocation of Executive Order No. 3345 of October 23, 1920, Withdrawing Public Lands for National Monument Classification
text:
ARIZONA
By virtue of and pursuant to the authority vested in me by the act of June 25, 1910, ch. 421, 36 Stat. 847, Executive Order No. 3345 of October 23, 1920, temporarily withdrawing public lands in Arizona for national-monument classification, is hereby revoked.
FRANKLIN D ROOSEVELT
The White House,
April 19, 1938.
